heroDesc: Handmade hijabs and custom plexi creations designed with love.
storyP1: Halahello started from a deeply personal passion — a love for beauty, modest fashion, and the art of meaningful handmade designs. What began as a dream has grown into a world where elegance and creativity come together.
storyP2: Each hijab is carefully selected and styled for the modern woman who values both modesty and elegance. Every plexi creation is handcrafted with attention to detail and a love for turning names and words into beautiful, lasting art pieces.
brandsDesc: Discover our two specialized collections — each crafted with the same passion for beauty and detail.
hijabDesc: Elegant modest fashion designed for everyday beauty. Carefully curated hijabs that blend comfort with luxury for the modern woman.
plexiDesc: Custom plexi creations for gifts, names, décor, and special moments. Handcrafted with precision and love for every detail.
hijabSub: Discover hijabs that combine luxury fabrics with timeless designs.
plexiSub: Custom plexi creations that turn names into lasting works of art.
customDesc: Design your own plexi piece for weddings, gifts, baby names, or home decoration. Tell us your vision and we'll bring it to life.
formSuccess: Thank you! Your custom design request has been received. We will contact you soon.
test1: The hijabs are so elegant and comfortable. I get compliments every time I wear one. The quality is unlike anything I've found before.
test2: The plexi name sign I ordered was absolutely perfect. It arrived beautifully packaged and the craftsmanship is incredible.
test3: Amazing quality and beautiful designs. Halahello truly understands elegance. I've ordered multiple times and every piece is stunning.
test4: I ordered a wedding name sign and it was the highlight of our reception decor. So many guests asked where we got it from!
ctaDesc: Explore our collections and find pieces that speak to your sense of beauty.
contactSuccess: Thank you for your message! We'll get back to you soon.
contactConnectDesc: Follow us on Instagram for daily inspiration, new arrivals, and behind-the-scenes content.
footerDesc: Where elegance meets creativity. Handmade hijabs and custom plexi creations designed with love.
authLoginSub: Enter your phone number to sign in or create an account
authOTPSub: We've sent a 6-digit code to your WhatsApp
